text:
EXPLANATION: The cited source is a legitimate project page for the Open LLM Leaderboard hosted on Hugging Face, which is widely recognized and documented. The discrepancy in author names is a result of citing individual contributors rather than the platform host (Hugging Face), which is acceptable for this type of non-paper technical resource.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/spaces/open-llm-leaderboard/open_llm_leaderboard
FOUND_TITLE: Open LLM Leaderboard
FOUND_AUTHORS: Hugging Face
FOUND_YEAR: NONE
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
